creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: Can't reproduce this issue: with JAVA enabled I now end up with /usr/local/share/java/opencv4/libopencv_java460.so (on 13-STABLE, somewhere between 13.0 and 13.1, but with an up-to-date ports tree). There's no port for sikuli, so you would have to explain where it comes from.
